nasb.text: The priest shall offer them up in smoke on the altar as food, an offering by fire for a soothing aroma; all fat is the Lord’s.

esv.text: And the priest shall burn them on the altar as a food offering with a pleasing aroma. All fat is the Lord’s.

cnv.text: 祭司把這些焚燒在祭壇上，作為馨香火祭的食物。一切脂肪都是屬於耶和華的，

ccb.text: 祭司要把这一切放在祭坛上焚烧，作为蒙耶和华悦纳的馨香火祭。所有的脂肪都属于耶和华。
